CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
A graduate with work experience, Karthik wanted an MBA.
Where do I even start?
2
The forms and steps felt scattered and confusing.
Am I even eligible?
3
Then he found one simple online admission process.
Just a few clear steps!
4
He applied in minutes, guided at every step.
My application is in!

How MBA Admission Works

  • 1
    Eligibility is simple: a bachelor's degree in any stream.
  • 2
    The whole application is online, so you can apply from home in minutes.
  • 3
    No entrance exam. Admission is merit based, and work experience is welcome.
  • 4
    Upload your documents, pay the registration fee, and a counsellor guides you through.

SPECIAL POWER 1

Master AI Tools from Semester 1

AI isn't an afterthought here - you apply real AI tools from your very first semester, in every subject.

Prompt EngineeringPower BIPythonMS CopilotMicrosoft FabricGenerative AIFinancial ModellingData AnalyticsBusiness AnalyticsExcelTableauDesign Thinking
SPECIAL POWER 2

Micro-Credentials Included - No Extra Cost

Earn 2 credits per micro-credential alongside your MBA - Google AI Essentials, Power BI, Financial Modelling & more, taught by industry experts.

Powered byGoogleMicrosoftIndustry Experts
SPECIAL POWER 3

Learn Your Way, Fully Supported

Flexible online learning with weekend live classes, a dedicated batch owner, virtual labs and a Sunday Social network - support every step of the way.

Weekend Live ClassesBatch Owner SupportVirtual LabsSunday Social Network
